notes: VAL-PROFILE-005: Encryption verified - AES-256-GCM with scrypt key derivation. All 17 unit tests pass. Note: name/bio columns exist in plaintext alongside encrypted_data - design consideration for defense-in-depth.
VAL-UI-002/003/004: Responsive layouts verified at 1280px (desktop), 900px (tablet), 375px (mobile). All breakpoints adapt correctly.
VAL-UI-007/008: Keyboard navigation with visible 3px focus rings. ARIA labels and semantic landmarks (nav, main, footer) properly implemented.
VAL-LEGAL-001: Medical disclaimer visible in footer on all pages with role='contentinfo' and aria-label='Legal disclaimer'.
VAL-LEGAL-002: No diagnosis, prescription, or medical claims found in AI conversation content.
VAL-CROSS-001: Complete user journey works (profile -> session -> end -> summary -> history -> reload). Note: model mismatch (gemma4 vs llama3.2) prevents AI response but flow completes.
VAL-CROSS-002: Voice controls activate with proper UI state changes and error handling. Full audio verification requires manual testing.
VAL-CROSS-003: Read-only features (profile, history, past sessions) work correctly when AI is unavailable. Error messages shown for write operations.
